availability.p: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 Deed Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

All citation, reuse or distribution of this work must contain a link back to DOI: https://doi.org/10.60760/unibo/igcyrgvcyr2 and the filename (IGCyr000000 or GVCyr000), as well as the year of consultation.

msIdentifier.idno: fragment a: 343; fragment b: 1822; fragment c: 2994

support.p: Three non adjacent fragments of a Parian marble half column, produced through sawing vertically a fluted column and offering a new, slightly tapering surface, the other half having been used for IGCyr065210; the surface is badly chipped off, fragment b is broken on top, right and below and has on its left side the same flat margin (0.045 wide) before the first fluting as fragment a; fragment c is broken on all sides, but for a very small part of the right side, which shows a flat margin also 0.045 wide; fragment a has been sawn off behind, offering a flat surface, either for the list itself or for the re-use as a pavement (fragment a 0.52-0.54 1.24 0.22 ; fragment b 0.30 0.40 0.33 ); fragment c 0.22 0.12 0.095 .

handDesc.handNote: 0.016-0.02 (min E to max I) at ll. 1-2, 0.08 from l. 3 on; serifs.

provenance.p: Fragment a found in 1926 at Cyrene: re-used as pavement of the frigidarium of the Byzantine Baths; fragment b found before 1961 at unknown place; fragment c found before 1982 at unknown place.
Fragments a and b seen in 1979 by C. Dobias-Lalou in Shahat: Cyrene Museum.
Fragment c seen in 1982 by C. Dobias-Lalou in Shahat: Cyrene Museum.

encodingDesc.p: Marked-up according to the EpiDoc Guidelines version 8

revisionDesc.change: translations fgt c and additional commentary
added ref to the first edition
added French and English translations; slight corrections in text and apparatus
checked, updated and in case corrected
checked, updated and in case corrected physDesc, history, and textClass

desc.ref: Fragment a, ll. 1-22 of igcyr065200 List of contributors

Fragment a, ll. 57-80 of igcyr065200 List of contributors
Fragment b of igcyr065200 List of contributors
Squeeze of fragment c of igcyr065200 List of contributors

div.ab:
Ἱαρεὺς Νικόβωλος Ἰάσονος·
ὅσσοι ἐπέδωκαν χρήματα τᾶι πόλει·

div.p: Fragment a, col. i
Fragment a, col. ii
Fragment b

rdg.note: the ligature for 2000, being taller, has been written further to the left and no character is missing after it

div.p: a. Prêtre Nikobolos fils d'Iasôn. Tous ceux qui ont volontairement donné des espèces à la cité :

i. (5) 1000 drachmes, 900 drachmes, fils de es 1100 drachmes, fils de as 600 drachmes, fils de pos 500 drachmes, (10) fils de Thémisôn 1000 drachmes, fils de andros , 80 drachmes, 800 drachmes, fils d'Haniochos, , (15) , fils de Theukhrestos, , , , , (20) arkhos fils de , Agathos fils de , Lysistratos fils de , Theudoros fils d'Iasôn , Deinis fils d'Anaximandros , (25) Kalliphantos fils de , Sôsis fils de , Polianthès fils de , Paraibatas fils de , Exakon fils d'Androsthénès , (30) Kharôn fils de , Sôsippos fils de , Philoxénos fils de Sôsippos , Aiglanôr fils de Sôsippos , Karnèdas fils de , (35) Agathoklès fils de Euphranôr fils de Praxis , Mélanippos fils d'Aristôn , Agathinos fils de Mélanippos , Aristippos fils de Mélanippos , (40) Mélanippos fils de , Timonothos fils de Dioklès , Hipp, Iasôn fils de Lysimakhos , Iasôn fils d'Hagèsistratos , (45) Nikis fils d'Aristôn , Aristagoras fils de , Kleuthémis fils de , Aratos fils de Timasianax , Lysis fils de Lysôn , (50) Aristis fils de Poseid, Theumiôn fils de Phil, Exainetos fils de , Theudôros fils de Lysistratos , Astyllos fils de , (55) Aristagoras fils de , Prôros fils de , Arim,

ii. Hippostratos fils de Kharilas , Pratarkhos fils d'Iasôn 300 drachmes, (5) Sôstratos fils de Pratarkhos 250 drachmes, Aristotélès fils de Praxitimos 250 drachmes, Teisôn fils d'Aristotélès , Euippos fils de Praxis , Simos fils de Tisamenos , (10) Sôpatros fils d'Aristotélès , Paraibatas fils de Mnasôn , Hagèsandros fils de Philôn , Zènodôros fils de Bakal , Pheidimos fils de Karnis , (15) Philôtas fils d'Iasôn , Apollônios fils de 370 drachmes, Andrôn fils de Polyklès 1000 drachmes, Theukhrestos fils de Theukrisios 250 drachmes, Terpsiklès fils de Zènôn 500 drachmes, (20) 250 drachmes, fils de nès 250 drachmes, 70 drachmes, fils de Mnasarkhos 250 drachmes, chos fils de Polyarkhos 80 drachmes, (25) 50 drachmes, fils de andros 80 drachmes, fils de Theuphrastos , fils d'Apollônios , 900 drachmes, (30) , fils de Theukhrestos , fils d'Exakis 250 drachmes, fils de xénos , fils de onikos , (35) fils d'Androxénos , fils de Damatrios 70 drachmes, fils de ôn 250 drachmes, fils de isis 250 drachmes, fils de Karnèdas 50 drachmes, (40) fils de sios , fils de Thémisôn 250 drachmes, fils de Mânis 250 drachmes, fils de tisthenes 300 drachmes, 1000 drachmes, (45) 400 drachmes, fils de Sôsilas , fils de as , fils de es , fils de enos , (50) fils de os , fils de os , , fils de Khainys , , , , , , , , fils de Kaphisias , fils de dôros 200 drachmes, , fils de sias , (65) , fils de tès , , fils de nos , , (70) 200 drachmes, fils de ènos , , , , (75) , , , , fils de ès , (80) fils de tos ,

b.i , os fils d'Eumèlidas , Thrasymakhos fils d'Arist, Aristomakhos fils de Strat, Haniokhos fils d'Aristomakhos , (5) Khartadas fils de Philoxénos , Philôn fils d'Ammônios , Pratomedes fils d'Arkhikles , Karnedas fils de Pratomèdès , Karnèdas fils d'Iasis , (10) Khairesilas fils d'Iasis 500 drachmes, Aratos fils de Kleuthemis 500 drachmes, Epikratès fils de Philoxénos 2000 drachmes, Epikratès fils d'Epik 500 drachmes, Hagesistratos figlio di 1500 drachmes, (15) Artemidôros fils de 2000 drachmes, Philippos fils d'Y 300 drachmes, Kharitimos fils d'A 250 drachmes, Aristôn fils de Kottabos 250 drachmes, Kallimakhos fils d'Aristôn 250 drachmes, (20) Epikartès fils d'Epitélès 300 drachmes, Philytas fils d'Aiglanôr , Oineus fils de Sôsandros 1000 drachmes, Polyarkhos fils d'Oineus 1000 drachmes, Euphraios fils de Nikias , (25) Nikias fils d'Euphraios , fils d'Antiphanès , fils d'Antiphanès , fils d'Antiphanès , fils de ès ,
c.ii , io, istos fils de , , tas fils d'Euklès, , s fils de Pratomèdès, , (5) ès fils de Damophilos , s fils de Damophilos, 400 drachmes, fils de Pratomèdès, ,
a. Priest Nikobolos son of Iason. All those who freely gave money to the city:

i. (5) 1000 drachmas, 900 drachmas, son of es 1100 drachmas, son of as 600 drachmas, son of pos 500 drachmas, (10) son of Themison 1000 drachmas, son of andros , 80 drachmas, 800 drachmas, son of Haniochos , (15) , son of Theuchrestos , , , , (20) archos son of , Agathos son of , Lysistratos son of , Theudoros son of Iason , Deinis son of Anaximandros , (25) Kalliphantos son of , Sosis son of , Polianthes son of , Paraibatas son of , Exakon son of Androsthenes , (30) Charon son of , Sosippos son of , Philoxenos son of Sosippos , Aiglanor son of Sosippos , Karnedas son of , (35) Agathokles son of , Euphranor son of Praxis , Melanippos son of Ariston , Agathinos son of Melanippos , Aristippos son of Melanippos , (40) Melanippos son of , Timonothos son of Diokles , Hipp, Iason son of Lysimachos , Iason son of Hagesistratos , (45) Nikis son of Ariston , Aristagoras son of , Kleuthemis son of , Aratos son of Timasianax , Lysis son of Lyson , (50) Aristis son of Poseid, Theumion son of Phil, Exainetos son of , Theudoros son of Lysistratos , Astyllos son of , (55) Aristagoras son of , Proros son of , Arim,

ii. Hippostratos son of Charilas , Pratarchos son of Iason 300 drachmas, (5) Sostratos son of Pratarchos 250 drachmas, Aristoteles son of Praxitimos 250 drachmas, Teison son of Aristoteles , Euippos son of Praxis , Simos son of Tisamenos , (10) Sopatros son of Aristoteles , Paraibatas son of Mnason , Hagesandros son of Philon , Zenodoros son of Bakal , Pheidimos son of Karnis , (15) Philotas son of Iason , Apollonios son of 370 drachmas, Andron son of Polykles 1000 drachmas, Theuchrestos son of Theukrisios 250 drachmas, Terpsikles son of Zenon 500 drachmas, (20) 250 drachmas, son of nes 250 drachmas, 70 drachmas, son of Mnasarchos 250 drachmas, chos son of Polyarchos 80 drachmas, (25) 50 drachmas, son of andros 80 drachmas, son of Theuphrastos , son of Apollonios , 900 drachmas, (30) , son of Theuchrestos , son of Exakis 250 dracme, son of xenos , son of onikos , (35) son of Androxenos , son of Damatrios 70 drachmas, son of on 250 drachmas, son of isis 250 dracme, son of Karnedas 50 dracme, (40) son of sios , son of Themison 250 drachmas, son of Manis 250 drachmas, son of tisthenes 300 dracme, 1000 dracme, (45) 400 dracme, son of Sosilas , son of as , son of es , son of enos , (50) son of os , son of os , , son of Chainys , , (55) , , , , , , son of Kaphisias , son of doros 200 drachmas, , son of sias , (65) , son of tes , , son of nos , , (70) 200 drachmas, son of enos , , , , (75) , , , , son of es , (80) son of tos ,

b.i , os son of Eumelidas , Thrasymachos son of Arist, Aristomachos son of Strat, Haniochos son of Aristomachos, , (5) Chartadas son of Philoxenos , Philon son of Ammonios , Pratomedes son of Archikles , Karnedas son of Pratomedes , Karnedas son of Iasis , (10) Chairesilas son of Iasis 500 drachmas, Aratos son of Kleuthemis 500 dracme, Epikrates son of Philoxenos 2000 drachmas, Epikrates son of Epik 500 drachmas, Hagesistratos son of 1500 drachmas, (15) Artemidoros son of 2000 drachmas, Philippos son of Y 300 drachmas, Charitimos son of A 250 drachmas, Ariston son of Kottabos 250 drachmas, Kallimachos son of Ariston 250 drachmas, (20) Epikartes son of Epiteles 300 drachmas, Philytas son of Aiglanor , Oineus son of Sosandros 1000 drachmas, Polyarchos son of Oineus 1000 drachmas, Euphraios son of Nikias , (25) Nikias son of Euphraios , son of Antiphanes , son of Antiphanes , son of Antiphanes , son of es ,
c.ii , io, istos son of , , tas son of Eukles, , s son of Pratomedes, , (5) es son of Damophilos, , s son of Damophilos, 400 drachmas, son of Pratomedes, ,
a. Sacerdote Nikobolos figlio di Iason. Quanti donarono somme di denaro alla città:

i. (5) 1000 dracme, 900 dracme, figlio di es 1100 dracme, figlio di as 600 dracme, figlio di pos 500 dracme, (10) figlio di Themison 1000 dracme, figlio di andros , 80 dracme, 800 dracme, figlio di Haniochos , (15) , figlio di Theuchrestos , , , , (20) archos figlio di , Agathos figlio di , Lysistratos figlio di , Theudoros figlio di Iason , Deinis figlio di Anaximandros , (25) Kalliphantos figlio di , Sosis figlio di , Polianthes figlio di , Paraibatas figlio di , Exakon figlio di Androsthenes , (30) Charon figlio di , Sosippos figlio di , Philoxenos figlio di Sosippos , Aiglanor figlio di Sosippos , Karnedas figlio di , (35) Agathokles figlio di , Euphranor figlio di Praxis , Melanippos figlio di Ariston , Agathinos figlio di Melanippos , Aristippos figlio di Melanippos , (40) Melanippos figlio di , Timonothos figlio di Diokles , Hipp, Iason figlio di Lysimachos , Iason figlio di Hagesistratos , (45) Nikis figlio di Ariston , Aristagoras figlio di , Kleuthemis figlio di , Aratos figlio di Timasianax , Lysis figlio di Lyson , (50) Aristis figlio di Poseid, Theumion figlio di Phil, Exainetos figlio di , Theudoros figlio di Lysistratos , Astyllos figlio di , (55) Aristagoras figlio di , Proros figlio di , Arim,

ii. Hippostratos figlio di Charilas , Pratarchos figlio di Iason 300 dracme, (5) Sostratos figlio di Pratarchos 250 dracme, Aristoteles figlio di Praxitimos 250 dracme, Teison figlio di Aristoteles , Euippos figlio di Praxis , Simos figlio di Tisamenos , (10) Sopatros figlio di Aristoteles , Paraibatas figlio di Mnason , Hagesandros figlio di Philon , Zenodoros figlio di Bakal , Pheidimos figlio di Karnis , (15) Philotas figlio di Iason , Apollonios figlio di 370 dracme, Andron figlio di Polykles 1000 dracme, Theuchrestos figlio di Theukrisios 250 dracme, Terpsikles figlio di Zenon 500 dracme, (20) 250 dracme, figlio di nes 250 dracme, 70 dracme, figlio di Mnasarchos 250 dracme, chos figlio di Polyarchos 80 dracme, (25) 50 dracme, figlio di andros 80 dracme, figlio di Theuphrastos , figlio di Apollonios , 900 dracme, (30) , figlio di Theuchrestos , figlio di Exakis 250 dracme, figlio di xenos , figlio di onikos , (35) figlio di Androxenos , figlio di Damatrios 70 dracme, figlio di on 250 dracme, figlio di isis 250 dracme, figlio di Karnedas 50 dracme, (40) figlio di sios , figlio di Themison 250 dracme, figlio di Manis 250 dracme, figlio di tisthenes 300 dracme, 1000 dracme, (45) 400 dracme, figlio di Sosilas , figlio di as , figlio di es , figlio di enos , (50) figlio di os , figlio di os , , figlio di Chainys, , (55) , , , , , , , figlio di Kaphisias , figlio di doros 200 dracme, , figlio di sias , (65) , figlio di tes , , figlio di nos , , (70) 200 dracme, figlio di enos , , , , (75) , , , , figlio di es , (80) figlio di tos ,

b.i , os figlio di Eumelidas , Thrasymachos figlio di Arist, Aristomachos figlio di Strat, Haniochos figlio di Aristomachos , (5) Chartadas figlio di Philoxenos , Philon figlio di Ammonios , Pratomedes figlio di Archikles , Karnedas figlio di Pratomedes , Karnedas figlio di Iasis , (10) Chairesilas figlio di Iasis 500 dracme, Aratos figlio di Kleuthemis 500 dracme, Epikrates figlio di Philoxenos 2000 dracme, Epikrates figlio di Epik 500 dracme, Hagesistratos figlio di 1500 dracme, (15) Artemidoros figlio di 2000 dracme, Philippos figlio di Y 300 dracme, Charitimos figlio di A 250 dracme, Ariston figlio di Kottabos 250 dracme, Kallimachos figlio di Ariston 250 dracme, (20) Epikartes figlio di Epiteles 300 dracme, Philytas figlio di Aiglanor , Oineus figlio di Sosandros 1000 dracme, Polyarchos figlio di Oineus 1000 dracme, Euphraios figlio di Nikias , (25) Nikias figlio di Euphraios , figlio di Antiphanes , figlio di Antiphanes , figlio di Antiphanes , figlio di es ,
c.ii , io, istos figlio di , , tas figlio di Eukles, , s figlio di Pratomedes, , (5) es figlio di Damophilos, , s figlio di Damophilos, 400 dracme, figlio di Pratomedes, ,

This list of contributors was cut in the same workshop and by the same hand as IGCyr065210; a third list with a similar, but somewhat smaller lettering is IGCyr097170, while a fragment recorded in 1861 but now lost (IGCyr009300) cannot be attributed to anyone of the three lists. Having been reused in the Byzantine baths, the present list is much worn out.
The incipit is restored through collation with IGCyr065210. As to the general organisation of the text, see at IGCyr065210.

The bad condition of the surface induces to suggest some alternative readings in commentary. For instance, the number written Ϡ at a.i.6 might have lost a small letter in ligature above and correspond to 1000; the number now readable as π at a.i.12 is perhaps a further instance of Ϡ. However, the amounts surpassing 1000 are not the most numerous ones and at any case there is no decreasing classification of the contributions. The chronological order of the deposits is the most plausible.

Fragment c is newly added in . Only the very small vestiges of its right side allow to relate it to the right column, in the same way as fragment b is related to the left column. A junction between them is impossible.
